author: dev_bob
content: I'm looking into the crash in getstatusbarheight. It seems to be triggered by the new Android 13 update.

author: sarah_manager
content: Bob, let's prioritize the fix for com.immomo.momo first. That crashlytics report looks bad.

author: dev_bob
content: Actually, scratch that. I found that getstatusbarheight is just a symptom of a larger issue in statusbarheightutil. I'm moving the fix to next week.

author: cto_dave
content: Agreed. We are officially delaying the Q1 release for the fabric app until this is resolved.
